channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Multimodal Context
channel.description: Latest Multimodal Context news in Context Engineering

item.title: Revisiting LLM Adaptation for 3D CT Report Generation: A Study of Scaling and Diagnostic Priors
item.description: arXiv:2606.17213v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent advances in multimodal learning, including large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs), have demonstrated strong adaptability to natural images. However, extending their use to the medical domain, particularly for volumetric ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> LLM, embedding, multimodal, fine-tuning, image | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: MODE: Modality-Decomposed Expert-Level Mixed-Precision Quantization for MoE Multimodal LLMs
item.description: arXiv:2606.17118v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts Multimodal Large Language Models (MoE-MLLMs) offer remarkable performance but incur prohibitive GPU memory costs, making compression essential. Among PTQ methods, expert-level mixed-precision quantization has proven effective for Mo...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> LLM, RAG, multimodal, memory, compression | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Probing, Fusion, and Trustworthiness: A Systematic Evaluation of Foundation Model Representations for Multimodal Cancer Analysis
item.description: arXiv:2606.17115v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Foundation models (FMs) have emerged as powerful representation extractors for medical data, yet their generalizability to datasets under distribution shift remains underexplored. This work systematically evaluates FM-based representations on a suite ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> multimodal, image, analysis, model, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 40%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)
